Not Sure what kind but HUGE very established patch on the turn off before getting on Colonial Parkway. VERY THORNY! Where bug spray the mosquitoes by the water are horrible. Good luck :) Access: Public.

Lots of fruits, some low hanging with no ladder or tool or climbing and many high. Ripe in October definitely but I am not sure about other months. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: October-November.
